company_context: HR Solutions, Payroll, and HR Outsourcing | TriNet Tell us about your HR setup. Get insights built for your business. Skip to main content HR Outsourcing Built for Small and Midsize Businesses Payroll. Benefits. Compliance. Technology. All in one place. Find Your HR Solution Book a Demo HR Solutions to Meet Your Business Needs TriNet offers a comprehensive Professional Employer Organization (PEO) and HR administrative service organization (ASO) called HR Plus to help U.S. businesses simplify HR operations, mitigate risk, and access to benefits to support growth. PEO Professional Employer Organization A PEO is a comprehensive HR solution. We support payroll, benefits administration, compliance, and risk mitigation. You also get access to big-company benefits through a co-employment model, where TriNet shares certain responsibilities with your business. Explore PEO HR Plus HR administrative service organization (ASO) An ASO gives you HR support without the co-employment relationship. You stay the employer of record, while TriNet helps with payroll processing, compliance tasks and benefits administration— so you get expert help while staying flexible. Explore HR Plus Not sure what kind of HR support you need? Take our short assessment to find out if PEO or HR Plus may be the best fit for your business. Take Assessment TriNet is like our safety net. They help us stay on top of everyday tasks, compliance, navigating benefits, and more. I love it .” Nicole Depelteau VP, Corporate Operations, Cask Government Services See Customer Story Offer Benefits Competitive benefits help attract and retain top talent—79% of employees say that having benefits that meet their needs is very important when choosing a job. * * TriNet State of the Workplace (2024) Learn More Run Payroll Efficient, timely payroll processing from an industry leader— we processed $73 billion in payroll in 2024. * *This reflects the amount across TriNet PEO and HR Plus solutions Learn More Stay Compliant Help mitigate risks that can be costly with compliance support. We help you navigate complex federal, state, and local rules and requirements. Learn More Learn about our services. HR Consulting Expertise Receive guidance on intricate HR challenges so you can maintain best practices. Learn More Access to Big-Company Benefits Seamlessly manage—and give employees access to—comprehensive benefits packages. Learn More Headache-Free Payroll Take care of all aspects of payroll processing helping to ensure timely, accurate payment and payroll tax compliance. Learn More Risk Mitigation and Up-to-Date HR Compliance Navigate the complexities of employment-related compliance concerns, staying up to date with federal state and local requirements. Learn More A Complete HR Platform Intuitive tools to help automate HR processes like time tracking, leave requests and more. Learn More Contractor and Global Workforce Support Pay independent contractors and integrate with partners for your international personn

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their HR operations. Can you tell me a bit about your current HR setup and what challenges you're facing?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Hi Alex, I'm John, the CTO here. We're currently using a comprehensive HR solution from TriNet, which includes payroll, benefits, and compliance. To be honest, we're pretty happy with their services, but we're always open to exploring new solutions that can help us improve our operations.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's great to hear that you're open to exploring new solutions. Our DeepData AI platform can help you automate many of your HR tasks, reduce manual errors, and provide valuable insights to inform your business decisions. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I think we could really help you optimize your HR operations.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but we're currently locked into a contract with TriNet for another 18 months. We've invested a lot in implementing their solution, and switching to a new provider would require significant resources and disruption to our business. Not to mention, we'd have to consider the costs of transitioning to a new platform.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns about the contract and the potential disruption. However, our solution can actually integrate with your existing systems, including TriNet, to provide a more comprehensive and automated HR solution. We've had success with similar integrations in the past, and I think we could make a strong case for why our solution is worth considering, even with the existing contract.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your persistence, Alex, but the reality is that we're not looking to make any significant changes to our HR setup right now. We're in the middle of a major project, and our focus is on getting that completed. Even if we were interested in your solution, I'm not sure we'd be able to get the necessary buy-in from our stakeholders to make a change like this. And to be honest, the cost of your solution is a bit higher than what we're currently paying TriNet.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your priorities, and I appreciate your honesty about the cost. We do offer flexible pricing plans and can work with you to find a solution that fits your budget. However, I also understand that timing is everything, and if now isn't the right time, I respect that.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alex, I appreciate the call and the information about DeepData AI, but I think we're going to have to pass on exploring your solution further. Our contract with TriNet is solid, and we're not looking to make any changes to our HR setup at this time. Thank you for your understanding, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively explored alternative timelines or potential pilot projects to address the buyer's current project priorities and contract constraints. Sentiment: Neutral
